name: Seafood
description: Set sail on an oceanic flavor voyage, where every bite carries the freshness of the tide and every dish echoes the elegance of coastal cuisine.

name: Lamb
description: Discover a rich culinary harmony, where tender lamb unfolds deep aroma and every plate reveals the warm character of timeless tradition.

name: Starter
description: Begin your dining story with inspired first notes, where every starter awakens the senses and sets a vibrant tone for what follows.

name: Chicken
description: Enjoy a comforting spectrum of flavor, where juicy chicken meets fragrant spices and each recipe turns familiar ingredients into pure delight.

name: Beef
description: Step into a bold taste experience, where slow-cooked depth and savory intensity transform every beef dish into a memorable centerpiece.

name: Dessert
description: Go on a taste journey, where every sip is a sophisticated creative chord, and every dessert is an expression of the most refined gastronomic desires.

name: Vegan
description: Explore plant-powered creativity, where vibrant textures and natural flavors come together in dishes that feel both nourishing and inspired.

name: Pork
description: Experience hearty culinary craftsmanship, where succulent pork and balanced seasoning create satisfying dishes full of character and warmth.

name: Vegetarian
description: Celebrate garden-fresh abundance, where colorful produce and thoughtful combinations shape every vegetarian plate into a refined everyday pleasure.

name: Miscellaneous
description: Embrace a world of unexpected pairings, where diverse influences and inventive ideas turn each recipe into a surprising gastronomic discovery.

name: Pasta
description: Follow the rhythm of Italian comfort, where silky sauces, perfect textures, and aromatic accents make every pasta dish irresistibly soulful.

name: Breakfast
description: Welcome the day with bright morning flavors, where every breakfast plate blends energy, comfort, and a fresh start in every bite.

name: Side
description: Complete your table with crafted companions, where every side dish adds contrast, balance, and a subtle flourish to the main course.

name: Goat
description: Savor distinctive rustic elegance, where tender goat meat and layered spices come together in recipes that honor heritage and depth.

name: Soup
description: Warm up with comforting bowls of flavor, where every soup blends aroma, texture, and homely richness into a soothing culinary embrace.
